name: get_forecast
description:
Domain: weather
Purpose: Get current conditions and a short-term weather forecast for a location.
Invoke when: Call this tool when the user asks about temperature, rain, wind, or upcoming weather.
Parameters: location is a city or place name; units is either metric or imperial.
Limitations: It cannot provide historical climate records or emergency warnings.
Example: User: Will I need an umbrella in Bengaluru today? Arguments: {"location":"Bengaluru","units":"metric"}

name: create_event
description:
Domain: calendar
Purpose: Create a new event in the user's calendar.
Invoke when: Call this tool when the user explicitly asks to schedule or add a calendar event.
Parameters: title is the event name; start_time is an ISO-8601 datetime; timezone is an IANA timezone.
Limitations: It cannot search existing events and must not be called without user intent to create an event.
Example: User: Schedule lunch tomorrow at noon. Arguments: {"title":"Lunch","start_time":"2026-06-30T12:00:00+05:30","timezone":"Asia/Kolkata"}
